results.title: Local notes: Experience Fayetteville hosts food photography workshop
results.description: Ozark United FC, in partnership with Ozarks Coca-Cola, FOX 24 and Experience Fayetteville, will host the final Global Game Fest community watch party during FIFA World Cup 2026 beginning at noon today at the Upper Ramble, 215 N. West Ave. in Fayetteville. Kickoff is at 2 p.m.

results.title: Valdez and Gonzalez homer as Pirates roll to win in Game 1
results.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Esmerlyn Valdez and Jacob Gonzalez hit two-run homers, Jared Jones struck out nine in five innings and the Pittsburgh Pirates defeated the Cleveland Guardians 7-1 on Saturday in the first game of a doubleheader. Nick Gonzales added a solo shot in the sixth inning as the Pirates extended their winning streak to [...]

results.title: England took first step towards elite nations with France win: Tuchel
results.description: Thomas Tuchel said England had taken their first step in closing the gap on the top football nations after edging a 10-goal thriller against France to finish third at the 2026 tournament."I said yesterday today is the first step to closing it.

results.title: Reds' Chase Burns on $105 million extension: 'A very, very easy decision'
results.description: The deal comes exactly two years to the day that Burns signed with the team for a then-record $9.25 million signing bonus.

results.title: Mexico’s Sheinbaum to attend World Cup final at President Trump’s invitation

results.description: Dave Rennie will give Codie Taylor all the time he needs to recover when he gathers his 44 to head to the republic for the toughest matchup in test rugby.

results.title: Dodgers and Yankees rained out, rescheduled as part of day-night doubleheader Sunday
results.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The Los Angeles Dodgers’ game at the New York Yankees on Saturday was postponed because of rain. It was rescheduled as part of a day-night doubleheader Sunday. The first game is slated to begin at 12:35 p.m. and the regularly scheduled series finale at 7:20 p.m. New York said Cam Schlittler The post Dodgers and Yankees rained out, rescheduled as part of day-night doubleheader Sunday appeared first on The Lethbridge Herald - News and Sports from around Lethbridge .
